title: Recent Insights into Hormonal Regulation of Development and Function: From Molecular Mechanisms to Therapeutic Innovation
description: This article synthesizes recent advances in understanding the role of hormones during development and their functional regulation. It explores foundational principles of hormone signaling, examines cutting-edge methodological approaches like single-cell RNA sequencing and CRISPR/Cas9, and investigates challenges such as sex-based differences in drug metabolism and hormonal disorder modeling. The content covers the validation of novel hormonal pathways and comparative analyses of endocrine networks, highlighting the translation of basic research into targeted therapies.
audience: researchers, scientists, and drug development professionals
